sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُنَا الْهَوَاتِفُ الذَّكِيَّةُ عَلَى التَّوَاصُلِ مَعَ الْأَصْدِقَاءِ وَالْعَائِلَةِ بِسُهُولَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Pametni telefoni nam pomažu da lako komuniciramo s prijateljima i porodicom.
sentences.translationEn: Smartphones help us communicate with friends and family easily.

sentences.arabic: نَسْتَخْدِمُ تَطْبِيقَاتٍ كَثِيرَةً لِتَعَلُّمِ لُغَاتٍ جَدِيدَةٍ وَقِرَاءَةِ الْكُتُبِ.
sentences.translation: Koristimo mnoge aplikacije za učenje novih jezika i čitanje knjiga.
sentences.translationEn: We use many applications to learn new languages and read books.

sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَتْ هَذِهِ الْأَجْهِزَةُ جُزْءًا مُهِمًّا جِدًّا مِنْ حَيَاتِنَا الْيَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi uređaji su postali veoma važan dio naše svakodnevice.
sentences.translationEn: These devices have become a very important part of our daily lives.
